name: list_file_labels
description: Tool to list the labels on a file. use when you need to retrieve all labels associated with a specific file in google drive.

file_id.description:
The ID of the file.
Example: "1aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789"

page_token.description: Token to retrieve a specific page of results.

max_results.description: The maximum number of labels to return per page. Default is 100.
